source_changes.summary: Adds a local HTTPS proxy TLS fixture and async tokio_base endpoint tests for HTTP-over-HTTPS-proxy, HTTPS-over-HTTPS-proxy, proxy CA failure, proxy hostname mismatch, and proxy mTLS missing/present client certificate.

covers: HTTP target over HTTPS proxy endpoint
absolute-form HTTP/1.1 request sent through proxy
HTTPS target over HTTPS proxy endpoint
CONNECT 204 No Content accepted as successful 2xx
origin TLS performed over established tunnel
proxy TLS config distinct from origin TLS config
proxy TLS wrong CA fails closed
proxy TLS hostname mismatch fails closed
proxy mTLS without client certificate fails closed
proxy mTLS with generated client certificate and private key succeeds

commands.command: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ylong_http_target CARGO_NET_GIT_FETCH_WITH_CLI=true GIT_CONFIG_COUNT=1 GIT_CONFIG_KEY_0='url.https://github.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git.insteadOf' GIT_CONFIG_VALUE_0='https://gitee.com/openharmony/commonlibrary_rust_ylong_runtime.git' cargo test -p ylong_http_client --test sdv_async_https_proxy_tls --no-default-features --features async,http1_1,tokio_base,c_openssl_3_0 -- --nocapture --test-threads=1

environment_notes: CARGO_TARGET_DIR was set to /tmp/ylong_http_target because /home had insufficient free space for repeated Rust builds.
The gitee runtime dependency was fetched through a per-command Git URL rewrite to the reachable GitHub mirror; no global git config or approved control JSON was changed.
remaining_related_work: S4 still needs sync/async shared semantics evidence and accurate report wording.
S5 still needs the broader test-matrix summary, including feature-off and HTTP/3-over-proxy boundaries where executable in this workspace.
